design_philosophy.visual_tone: Institutional yet Humane. Dark, muted tones for security; clean, warm paper tones for readability. No gradients.

primary.description: Deep Slate - Represents authority and night-time security.

secondary.description: Muted Teal - Represents safety and calm.

accent.description: Amber Gold - Used sparingly for 'Call to Action' or critical alerts.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200
buttons.ghost: text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all duration-200

cards.base: bg-white rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm p-6 md:p-8

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-border/40 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60

hero_background.usage: Use as a darkened background overlay for the Landing Page Hero section to imply 'Corporate/Legal' context.

security_context.alt: Black and White Tall Building Abstract
security_context.usage: Use for 'About WBUK' or 'Security Features' section background.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on colored backgrounds meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1).
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements MUST have a visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-secondary).
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid, muted colors or subtle textures.
Do not center-align long text blocks. Left-align for readability.
instructions_to_main_agent: Focus on building a 'Safe Harbor'. The UI should feel like a quiet, secure room. Avoid flashy animations. Use the provided image URLs for the landing page to set the tone, but rely on Lucide icons for the app interface to maintain clarity and performance.
